items.title: Investment in Austin-based startups grew to a record high of $7.19B in 2025, up from $4.37B in 2024 and topping a pandemic peak of $6.1B in 2021 (Mary Ann Azevedo/Crunchbase News)

items.title_zh: 对奥斯汀初创企业的投资将从 2024 年的 4.37B 美元增至 2025 年的历史新高 $7.19B，并在 2021 年突破大流行高峰 $6.1B (Mary Ann Azevedo/Crunchbase News)
items.title_bilingual: 对奥斯汀初创企业的投资将从 2024 年的 4.37B 美元增至 2025 年的历史新高 $7.19B，并在 2021 年突破大流行高峰 $6.1B (Mary Ann Azevedo/Crunchbase News) / Investment in Austin-based startups grew to a record high of $7.19B in 2025, up from $4.37B in 2024 and topping a pandemic peak of $6.1B in 2021 (Mary Ann Azevedo/Crunchbase News)
